mapper.select: SELECT g.group_code, g.gr_name, g.description, COUNT(gm.user_code) AS memberCount FROM "GROUP" g LEFT JOIN group_member gm ON g.group_code = gm.gr_code WHERE g.group_code > 0 AND g.gr_name NOT LIKE '%-delete' GROUP BY g.group_code, g.gr_name, g.description ORDER BY g.group_code

SELECT g.group_code, g.gr_name, g.description, COUNT(gm.user_code) AS member_count FROM "GROUP" g LEFT JOIN group_member gm ON g.group_code = gm.gr_code WHERE g.group_code = #{groupCode} GROUP BY g.group_code, g.gr_name, g.description

SELECT gm.gr_mem_code, gm.gr_code, gm.user_code, u.name AS user_name, u.email FROM group_member gm JOIN users u ON gm.user_code = u.user_code WHERE gm.gr_code = #{groupCode} AND u.is_lock = 0 ORDER BY gm.gr_mem_code

SELECT gpr.gr_pro_code, gpr.gr_code, gpr.project_code, p.project_name, p.status, gpr.role_code, r.role_name FROM gr_pro_role gpr JOIN projects p ON gpr.project_code = p.project_code JOIN role r ON gpr.role_code = r.role_code WHERE gpr.gr_code = #{groupCode} AND gpr.project_code > 0 ORDER BY gpr.gr_pro_code
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(gr_pro_code), 0) + 1 FROM gr_pro_role
INSERT INTO gr_pro_role ( gr_pro_code, gr_code, project_code, role_code ) VALUES ( #{grProCode}, #{grCode}, #{projectCode}, #{roleCode} )
mapper.update: UPDATE gr_pro_role SET project_code = project_code * -1 WHERE gr_pro_code = #{grProCode} AND project_code > 0
mapper.select: SELECT gr_pro_code, gr_code, project_code, role_code FROM gr_pro_role WHERE gr_code = #{grCode} AND project_code = #{projectCode} * -1
mapper.update: UPDATE gr_pro_role SET project_code = project_code * -1 WHERE gr_code = #{groupCode} AND project_code > 0
